completed_steps.summary: Classified as Nx monorepo with 4 parts (2 apps, 2 libs). Focus on 2 library parts: etl-manager and queue-manager
Found 1 existing doc (cron-jobs README.md in queue-manager). No root README, no architecture docs. User guidance: focus on /libs architecture analysis - how the code is structured and implemented.

Technology stack analyzed exhaustively with 9 elicitation methods. Output sharded into docs/technology-stack/ (9 sections) and docs/architecture-analysis/ (10 sections). 40 consolidated action items identified.

Conditional analysis complete for both backend parts. 6 documents written: API contracts (15 endpoints etl-manager, 5 endpoints queue-manager), data models (9 schemas etl-manager, 4 schemas queue-manager), comprehensive analysis (config, auth, entry points, async patterns, CI/CD for both parts).

files.summary: CronUtilsModule documentation - dynamic cron job registration, MongoDB persistence, full API reference

findings.user_context: Focus on /libs from an architecture view - how the code is structured and implemented

resume_instructions: Continue from step 5 - generate source tree analysis with annotations
